'''Collections''' are item releases that are not [[Seasonal Events]]. Before the implementation of Seasonal Events in October 2022, there were monthly [[Clothing]] and [[Furniture]] releases. Of these, there were 13 clothing collections and four furniture collections. There have also been five other miscellaneous collection releases. The [[Everyday Collection]] is an assortment of items that are always available in the shop. == Highlighted Collections== File:IslandTheme.jpg|[[Island Collection]] (August 2021), the first clothing collection File:SimpleRoom.jpg|[[Simple Collection]] (August 2022), one of the first furniture and interior collections File:PreppyCollection outfits September 2022.jpg|[[Preppy Collection]] (Sept 2022), the last clothing collection before Seasonal Events File:ContemporaryRoom.jpg|[[Contemporary Collection]] (September 2022), the last furniture and interior collection before Seasonal Events ==Monthly Releases== === 2021 Clothing Collections === {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed fandom-table" style="text-align:center; width:75%" !Month !Collection ![[Clothing]] |- | ====August==== |[[Island Collection]] | [[File:IslandTheme.jpg|thumb]] |- | ====October==== |[[Halloween Collection]] |[[File:Halloween.jpg|thumb]] |- | ====November ==== |[[Daily Collection]] |[[File:Daily.jpg|thumb]] |- | ====December==== |[[Winter Holiday Collection]]
